title: The Genesis Block: The Foundation of a Blockchain
description: A visual timeline showing the creation of the genesis block and its role as the immutable, trusted starting point for a blockchain.
relationships: Creator hardcodes the genesis block into the client software
Genesis block contains the first transaction and a unique, hardcoded hash
The hash of the genesis block is used to cryptographically link and validate the next block (Block 1)
This creates an immutable chain of trust from the very first block
